name: finance officers at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month tool
description: For finance officers at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month, manual tracking causes delays in compliance reporting. We automate reconciliation reporting instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated accounting software.
target_audience: finance officers at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate or delayed trust account reconciliation reports
features: manual entry for initial data input
